description: Create a perpendicular parking lot striping plan for a 6-space lot in LibreCAD using feet as units. The drawing must include a 57' wide x 42' high boundary rectangle on layer LOT-BOUNDARY (Color: White/7) starting at (0,0). The layout consists of a 24' drive aisle (Y=0 to Y=24) and 18' deep parking spaces (Y=24 to Y=42). The space configuration from left to right includes one 8' wide ADA space with a 4' wide access aisle (X=8 to X=12), followed by five 9' wide standard spaces. Use layer STRIPING (Color: Yellow/2) for vertical dividers and the horizontal back line at Y=24. On layer ADA (Color: Blue/5), hatch the access aisle and place the text "ADA" inside the first space. Include linear dimensions on layer DIMENSIONS (Color: Green/3) for overall width (57'), space depth (18'), drive aisle width (24'), and typical space width (9'). Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/parking_lot.dxf.
